scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.postbuild: python3 -c "import json,shutil,os; f=\"dist/_routes.json\"; d=json.load(open(f)); d[\"exclude\"]=list(set(d.get(\"exclude\",[])+[\"/cast/*\",\"/_astro/\"])); json.dump(d,open(f,\"w\"),indent=2); [shutil.copy2(os.path.join(\"public/cast\",x),os.path.join(\"dist/cast\",x)) for x in os.listdir(\"public/cast\") if x.endswith(\".jpg\")]"
